name: Chinese Style Beef and Vegetable Wrap-Ups
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, browned and drained
1 oz Package of fried rice seasoning mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crepes.
2. Pour the oil into a rectangular baking dish, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
3. In a skillet, mix the remaining ingredients and heat over medium heat until hot.
4. Spoon the mixture down the center of the crepes.
5. Fold the ends of the crepes over the brown mixture.
6. Place the folded sides down in the baking dish.
7. Bake until the crepes are crisp, 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Serve with sweet and sour sauce if desired. (6 servings)
